data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Conditional webhooks (only if condition met)', but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for conditional webhooks, yet the evidence does not include any checks or validations related to their implementation or behavior, indicating a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of conditional webhook implementation or verification.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the conditional webhook functionality.
